features: 15 Pcs Hair Ties: You will receive 15 pieces elastic hair bands with 5 different colors. Sufficient quantity and various styles can meet your daily needs, and you can also share these hair ties with your family or friends
Strong Elastic: Outer diameter the grab and go hair ties is about 2.36 inch/6 cm, coil line wide is about 0.315 inch/0.8 cm
Super Comfortable Elastic: These non-metal hair bands are made of soft fabric with durable rubber band, it will retain its elasticity and usability for a long time

Hair-Friendly: These hair ties are designed to protect your hair from damage and breakage while holding it securely in place and can be removed with a gentle pull, making it less likely to pull your hair

Widely Application: These elastics ties are suitable for all hair types including thin, medium thick, thick, straight, curly and wavy. Perfect for sports, parties, ceremonies, graduations, stage performances, dates and more
description: Product Description Sularpek 15 Pcs hair ties for women, sufficient quantity, rich colors, fashionable and versatile! Colors: black and white, shimmering brown, beige, black, brown Quantity: 15 pieces, 3 pieces of each color Material: Cotton Hairband diameter: 6 cm/2.3 in Longest diameter after stretching: 20 cm/7.87 in Hairband thickness: 0.8 cm/0.315 in Whether at the office, doing yoga, or traveling: The 15-piece hair ties organize your hair and style effortlessly. Metal-free design as a safe accessory for children and allergy sufferers.
